title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
tmdbOverview: Ten years after the events of the original, a reprogrammed T-800 is sent back in time to protect young John Connor from the shape-shifting T-1000. Together with his mother Sarah, he fights to stop Skynet from triggering a nuclear apocalypse.
synopsis: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991) is a action, thriller and science fiction film from France and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.6 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
